name: Next Right Thing
description: Hook-based OpenClaw adapter for the Next Right Thing run context and approval protocol.

approvalTimeoutMs.description: Approval timeout in milliseconds for guarded tool calls.

enabled.description: Enable the built-in reflective deliberation on finalize (opt-in; default false). Requires the allowConversationAccess hook permission.

reviewRoles.description: Extra review lenses to include in the contemplation.

maxAttempts.description: How many times to ask the model to reflect before finalizing (default 1).

enabled.description: Inject the Next Right Thing operating context into every model run (opt-in; default false). Requires the allowPromptInjection hook permission.

instruction.description: Optional replacement for the default Next Right Thing run-context instruction.

enforce.description: Run the before_agent_run coverage check before model inference (opt-in; default false). Requires the allowConversationAccess hook permission.

allowUnidentifiedRuntime.description: Allow models whose runtime/provider identity is not exposed to before_agent_run.

blockedRuntimeIds.description: Optional runtime ids to block when strict tool coverage is required.

blockedProviderIds.description: Optional provider ids to block when strict tool coverage is required.

message.description: Optional user-facing block message for uncovered runtime paths.
